title: elytrigia canina
intro: Elytrigia canina, also known as Elymus caninus or cat's tail grass, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Elytrigia canina include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin irritations. Elytrigia canina can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
